paper_title: LC-ESI qTOF analysis and Mass Spectrometry Identification of Allergens

methods.description: This method describes the process of using a high-resolution qTOF mass spectrometer for peptide identification, including the setup and parameters for the electrospray ionization and mass spectrometry analysis.

steps.description: All the MS and MS/MS experiments for peptide identification were performed using a maXis impact™ high-resolution qTOF mass spectrometer (Bruker Daltonics) equipped with a Captive Spray (Bruker Michrom) electrospray ionization platform.
steps.searchable_summary: perform MS and MS/MS experiments using qTOF mass spectrometer

steps.description: Separation was performed on a Dionex PepMap C18 column (250 mm Â 75 mm, 3 mm particle). The flow rate was set at 300 nL/min.
steps.searchable_summary: separate peptides using Dionex PepMap C18 column

steps.description: The mobile phases A and B were 0.1% formic acid in water and 0.1% formic acid in 80% ACN, respectively.
Positive ions (charge state þ1, þ2, þ3) were generated by the electrospray ionization captive source.
steps.searchable_summary: generate positive ions using electrospray ionization

steps.description: The following source settings were used for all subsequent data collection: Drying gas (nitrogen): 3 L/min, Dry temperature: 150°C, Capillary voltage: start at 1500-1700 V, decrease in 50 V steps until signal drops and add 300 V, End plate offset: 0 V.
steps.searchable_summary: set source parameters for mass spectrometry

steps.description: Survey scans were acquired within a range from 200 to 2000 m/z.
steps.searchable_summary: acquire survey scans in specified m/z range

steps.description: The spectrometer sequentially conducted MS/MS (in CID chamber) on the precursor ions (þ 2 and þ 3 charge state, excluding þ1) detected in the full scan in data independent manner.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct MS/MS on precursor ions in CID chamber

steps.description: MS/MS scans were conducted within a range from 25 to 2000 m/z.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct MS/MS scans in specified m/z range

steps.description: All MS and MS/MS raw data were acquired in .mgf format using Bruker's ProteinScape™ software (version 3.0).
steps.searchable_summary: acquire MS and MS/MS data in .mgf format
